description: Arena and Crystal Arena improvements, Journey Back cost rework, and multiple UI, mobile, and gameplay fixes.

sections.heading: Arena / Crystal Arena Changes
items: Improved Rank Point calculations to better match players to appropriate skill brackets
Players above bracket gain more points per win; underperforming players lose points faster
Improved matchmaking to prioritize similar rank brackets
Reduced Adventurer's Challenge Points from Arena losses by ~25%
Match rewards now shown after both Arena and Crystal Arena matches
sections.searchable_text: arena matchmaking rank points rewards challenge points

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Training Dummies now display detailed combat stats (damage, DPS, healing, HPS)
Headquarters Hideout access restriction reduced to 7 days after undeclare
Journey Back now uses average zone modifiers across route
Journey Back now uses cheapest route instead of shortest
Increased impact of zone type and item value on Journey Back cost
Decreased impact of distance on Journey Back cost
sections.searchable_text: training dummy stats journey back cost calculation hideout access

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed Soul Link tooltip not updating correctly
Fixed Purifying Combination hitting same target twice
Fixed Guild Warhorses unable to use Journey Back
Arena Stats window OK button now clickable
Marketplace Completed tab now updates correctly
Fixed mobile chat reconnect issue
Fixed mobile spell dragging when not ready
Fixed mobile fishing continuation issue
Gathering Masteries now correctly include Gathering Speed bonus
Certain mounts (Spring Cottontail, Recruiter's Toad/Frog) no longer usable in Arena/Crystal League
Fixed incorrect bonuses from raw Lurcher fish
Rare Castle chests now correctly remain Rare
Fixed missing summoned mobs from Siphoning Mages
Additional graphical, UI, terrain, audio, and localization fixes
sections.searchable_text: fixes ui mobile spells mounts gathering castle chests bugs
